name: neostack-connect
description: Connect Codex to a running NeoStackAI Unreal editor session.

interface.shortDescription: Drive a running Unreal editor with NeoStackAI loaded.
interface.longDescription: Bridges Codex to the MCP server running inside an open Unreal Engine session that has the NeoStackAI plugin enabled. Discovers the editor automatically by reading runtime.json from the active project.
